qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, Croatia. Conceded by Elliot Anderson.
Attempt missed. Josip Sutalo (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Ivan Perisic with a cross following a corner.
